_meta.purpose: Role → tier + quant floor + preferred local models. Single source of truth for role-based model selection (model_lanes.model_and_quant_for_role / A5 role resolver). No model name is hardcoded in logic — it all comes from here. Every model named below MUST exist in model_quant_profiles.json.

fields.tier: size tier the role maps onto (FAST/NORMAL/HEAVY/DEEP_THINKING/CODE)
fields.min_quant: lowest acceptable quant; selection never drops below this floor
fields.preferred_models: ordered preference, best→fallback; first installed model that fits wins
fields.required_for: capabilities that HARD-REQUIRE this role's model
fields.on_unavailable: what to do when no preferred model at >= min_quant fits — NEVER silently downgrade
fields.never_degrade_to_general: coding must never resolve to a non-coder model
fields.text_only_fallback: vision role may fall back to text-only when no multimodal model fits
